name: Terminal Favorite Carry V1

studio.description: ANOM-37 ciclo 11 — Terminal Favorite Carry: compra o favorito nos últimos 30s com spot < $20 do strike, ask 0.53–0.79, spread <= 0.03 e odds sum 0.98–1.06; hold to settlement.

notes: ANOM-37 (catalogo ciclo 11). Compra o favorito nos ultimos 30s com spot < $20 do strike, ask 0.53-0.79, spread <= 0.03 e odds sum saudavel; hold to settlement. GLS 62d: 4062 entradas, +$1874, exp +$0.46, PF 1.17, fresh exp +$0.56, 45/62 dias positivos. Sweep no train nao superou defaults no holdout.
